form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 H on April 15 over 525m at The Meadows behind Deadly Cool beaten 11 lengths (30.60). Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.
